creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/> should, please, include links to 
<https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/installation/> 
and any other relevant page; 
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/tree/main/website/content/en/releases/13.1R>. 

Thanks

<https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/ur65ph/-/i8wxq8y/> is exemplary of people not discovering the installation page.
